label: Option category
description: Defines an official category shown in RimWorld's options dialog, including the category label, icon texture path, and whether the category is developer-only.

texPath.label: Texture path
texPath.description: Content path to the icon texture drawn beside this options category. Source marks this field NoTranslate.

isDev.label: Is developer category
isDev.description: If true, this category is shown only when development mode is enabled.

basic-option-category.label: Basic option category
basic-option-category.description: Minimal options category with a def name, label, and icon texture path.
